tables: Airport Authority of India AAI Manager & Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 389 Post

Airports Authority of India (AAI) has released the notification for the recruitment of AAI Manager, Junior Executive 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following AAI Manager, Junior Executive 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 08/08/2026 to 07/09/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in AAI Manager, Junior Executive Recruitment 2026.
Airports Authority of India (AAI) AAI Manager, Junior Executive Online Form 2026 AAI Advt. No. : 12/2026/CHQ/DR‐CBT : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 08/08/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 07/09/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date 07/09/2026 Exam Date : As Per Schedule Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 1000/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- Female Candidate : 0/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

AAI Junior Executive & Manager Online Form 2026 : Age Limit as on 07/09/2026 Minimum Age : NA Maximum Age : 27 Years for Junior Executive Maximum Age : 32 Years for Manager Post Age Relaxation Extra as per AAI Manager, Junior Executive Examination 2026 Rules.
AAI Manager, Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 389 Post
AAI Manager, Junior Executive Exam Eligibility
MBA with Finance / PG Diploma in Management with Specialization in Finance OR CA / CFA
Bachelor Degree in Law (3 year / 5 Year) From Any Recognized University in India. Enrolled with Bar Council in India.
Bachelor Degree in Science with MBA OR Bachelor Degree in Engineering.

BE / B.Tech Degree in Civil OR M.SC Degree in Geography OR Master in remote Sensing and Geographic Information System or Master in Geo Informatics or Master in Geomatics. More Eligibility Read the Notification
BE / B.Tech Degree in Related Trade with 3 Year Experience.
MBA with Finance Specialization OR PG Diploma in Management with Finance Specialization  . 3 Year Experience.
BE / B.Tech Degree in Computer Science / Engineering / IT OR MCA 3 Year Experience
Bachelor Degree in Architecture and registered with Council of Architecture 3 Year Experience.
Bachelor Degree (3 Year / 5 Year) Law from Any Recognized University in India.  Enrolled with Bar Council 3 Year Experience.
BE / B.Tech Degree in Fire Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Automobile Engineering. 3 Year Experience
Bachelor Degree in Science B.SC with MBA OR Bachelor Degree in Engineering. 3 Year Experience
Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with MBA in Marketing Specialization OR Bachelor Degree in Engineering. 3 Year Experience
Master Degree in Mathematical Statistics / Operation Research / Statistics/ Applied Statistics / Economics with Statistics / Mathematics with Statistics. 3 Year Experience.
Bachelor Degree in Mass Communication / Journalism / Literature (Hindi/English) and PG Degree / Diploma in Journalism / Mass Media / Mass Communication. 3 Year Experience
